query:
UPDATE agreements
            SET agreement_status = $1,
                agreement_text = $2,
                governing_law = $3,
                dispute_resolution = $4,
                effective_date = $5,
                termination_date = $6,
                auto_renew = $7,
                version = $8,
                digital_signature_url = $9,
                executed_at = $10
            WHERE id = $11
